revision.content:
This page is for planning a Biology and Chemistry lab tentatively located in the closet where the laser cutter used to reside.

==Equipment==

Centrifuge ✓

Incubator(Shaker/agitator currently not working) ✓

OpenPCR or a [[https://tequals0.wordpress.com/2014/04/05/lightbulb-pcr-build-documentation/ Lightbulb PCR]]

Computer ✓

Hood

Agarose electrophoresis gel box(Can be built easily)

Lab fridge

Single/Multichannel pipettes + regular droppers/pipettes

Microscope

Microwave/pressure cooker/autoclave

Rotary evaporator

Reagents/other chemicals

Basic lab equipment

-Bunsen burner

-Precision scale

-Ring stand and clamps

-Petri dishes

-Funnel

-Test tube holder

-Wash bottle

-Crucible

-Rubber stoppers

-Forceps

-Pipestem triangle

-Mortar and pestle

-Tubing

-Aspirator

-Separatory funnel

Glassware

-Erlenmyer flask

-Test tubes and rack

-Beakers

-Gas bottle

-Graduated cylinder

==Room Modifications==

Plastic sheeting to maintain a clean room type environment
